name: Nations Lending - Columbus, OH Branch - NMLS: 1272338
description_short: Nations Lending is a mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and personalized loan solutions through local advisors in Columbus, OH and nationwide.
description_long:
Nations Lending operates as a residential mortgage lender with an NMLS number (1272338) and maintains a Columbus, OH branch with local loan officers. The company positions itself around personalized service, using the tagline "home loans made human" to emphasize relationship-based lending rather than purely transactional processes. They serve borrowers across multiple states with a network of personal mortgage advisors.

The company offers home financing for first-time homebuyers, repeat home purchases, and refinancing situations. Based on website content, they work with borrowers to find solutions tailored to individual financial situations and homeownership goals. The Columbus branch specifically lists two named loan officers: Michael Roach (Sales Production Manager, NMLS# 1410923) and Katelynn Stottsberry (Personal Mortgage Advisor, NMLS# 1983381), both with direct phone lines for local contact.

Nations Lending distinguishes itself through emphasis on personal advocacy and local relationships. Customer reviews highlight specific loan officer names (Nadiem, Reid, Brianna, Max, etc.), suggesting individualized service models. The company frames homeownership around lifestyle benefits ("drinks on the patio," "backyard barbecues") rather than purely financial mechanics, indicating a relationship-focused marketing approach.

The available data shows mixed experiences. While numerous reviews praise responsiveness, professionalism, and individual loan officer quality, some borrowers report frustrations with underwriting delays (one borrower experienced a 33-day closing delay from promised October 31 to December 3 closing) and unexplained loan amount changes. One reviewer noted communication clarity issues regarding company identification in unsolicited contacts. The company explicitly notes "Not for use by New York borrowers," limiting geographic availability.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Local personal mortgage advisors available by phone with direct contact information for Columbus branch
Multiple positive customer reviews praising individual loan officer responsiveness and professionalism
Serves diverse borrower scenarios: first-time home buyers, repeat purchases, and refinancing
Reviews highlight quick response times and ongoing communication throughout the loan process
Relationship-focused service model with named loan officers rather than call center structure
NMLS-registered loan officers with transparent licensing numbers publicly displayed
cons: Documented closing delays: one borrower experienced 33-day postponement from promised date with higher resulting interest rate due to underwriting issues
Communication clarity concerns: at least one customer reported not knowing which company was contacting them, raising identification transparency issues
Unexplained loan amount changes: one review mentions loan amount dropped three times without explanation
Geographic restriction: explicitly states service not available for New York borrowers, limiting market reach
Underwriting process appears prone to delays that impact closing timelines and loan terms
best_for: Homebuyers prioritizing personalized service and direct relationships with named loan officers over online-only processes
Refinance borrowers in states outside New York seeking local phone-based advisory support
First-time homebuyers who value hand-holding through the loan process and frequent communication
diagnosis: Nations Lending is best for borrowers who value personalized, relationship-based mortgage service from a named loan officer over purely digital processes. The main caveat is that closing timelines and underwriting decisions appear inconsistent—borrowers should establish clear, written expectations about closing dates and loan terms upfront, as at least one borrower experienced significant delays and rate changes due to underwriting complications.
services: Home purchase financing for first-time homebuyers
Home purchase financing for repeat home purchases
Personal mortgage advisory services through local loan officers
Personalized loan solutions based on individual financial situations
Direct phone and in-person consultation with local Columbus branch advisors
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 10 N High St Suite 200, Office 221, Columbus, OH 43215
